Title: Add images to agent sessions

The post [Add images to agent sessions](https://github.blog/changelog/2026-03-05-add-images-to-agent-sessions) appeared first on [The GitHub Blog](https://github.blog).
EnhancedContent:
Quick start your agent session by starting from an image. Simply paste, drag, or click the image icon to wherever you work with agents on github.com (e.g., from [the recently released **Agents** tab](https://github.blog/changelog/2026-01-26-introducing-the-agents-tab-in-your-repository/) in a repository).

Let us know what you build by sharing your feedback. Click the **Give feedback** button on the top-right corner of any agent session.
